configurations.name: with_skill
configurations.label: With /tech-advisor skill (v3 — Datadog + DB + entry point reading)

evals.notes: Grading script missed opinionated-take (regex too narrow). Manual review: clear opinions throughout ('biggest risk surface', 'should use event-driven notification'). Now includes Datadog monitor gap finding.
Grading script missed arch docs ref (present but not matching narrow regex) and questions section ('Questions to Drive This Discussion' at line 186 with 7 questions). All manually verified.
Real gap: doc-vs-code validation section missing (focused on production findings instead). No version citations (infra topic). 10 findings including new ones from settings/lifespan reading.

analyst_observations: Pass rate stable at 96.3% across iterations 2 and 3 — the core quality is consistent
New Datadog subagent surfaced unique findings: 'No monitors configured despite metrics infrastructure' (eval 1), confirming production observability adds real value
Entry point reading fix confirmed: eval 1 now correctly identifies ThreadPoolExecutor config in main.py lifespan — no more false claims about missing pool sizing
Token usage up ~27% from iteration 1 (115K → 146K) and duration up ~8% from iteration 2 — the additional subagents add cost but surface genuinely new findings
SNS/SQS eval consistently the weakest on doc-validation and version citations — infrastructure topics are structurally harder for these assertions
The skill now consistently produces 7-10 actionable findings per topic with 7+ probing questions, grounded in code + docs + production data
Diminishing returns signal: pass rate hasn't improved since iteration 2. The skill is ready for description optimization and finalization.
